## Feature Description

<!-- Clear description of the feature you'd like -->

## Problem Statement

<!-- What limitation or gap does this address? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe your proposed solution. Include the CLI usage if applicable: -->

```sh
dqt <subcommand> --new-option value
```

## Affected Component

- [ ] profile
- [ ] assess
- [ ] export / export-star
- [ ] compare / history
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Other approaches you've thought about and why you prefer this one -->

## Use Cases

<!-- Specific situations where this would be valuable -->

## Implementation Considerations

- [ ] New dependencies required: Yes / No
- [ ] Breaking changes: Yes / No
- [ ] Affects existing CLI flags or output format: Yes / No

## Related Issues

<!-- Link any related issues or PRs -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this hasn't been requested
- [ ] I have described the problem this solves
- [ ] I have considered how it fits the current CSV-first / CLI-first scope
